headline: Global Payments Bets On AI Handhelds And Embedded Deals In Restaurants
summary: Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) introduced an AI first Genius handheld POS device and new kiosk solutions at the National Restaurant Association Show. The company renewed and expanded embedded payments partnerships, including with Lightspeed DMS. Global Payments released in house research on how "order anxiety" is influencing restaurant technology and customer behavior. Global Payments operates across merchant acquiring, issuer processing and integrated payments, and this latest product set...
